data.title: Second poor job report undermines Trump’s economy claims. After August’s bad data, official was fired. This month’s numbers remain bleak.
data.description: Following a disappointing employment report in August, the President dismissed the official responsible for the statistics. The latest data for this month also showed discouraging figures.

data.title: iolite Partners calls for leadership change at Dynacor due to weak Q2 results and lack of transparency.
data.description: In Freienbach, Switzerland, iolite Partners Ltd. is urging for the removal of Chairman Pierre Lépine and CEO Jean Martineau of Dynacor Group Inc. (TSX:DNG). As the company's largest shareholder, iolite stresses the need for leadership change due to Dynacor's poor performance compared to industry competitors. Despite efforts to expand into West Africa and Ecuador, concerns are rising over the company's operations in Peru, with contradicting statements and a loss of market confidence. Shareholder dissatisfaction persists as Dynacor's management fails to address these issues effectively.

data.title: Cryptocurrency market remains flat post volatile session with Bitcoin at $111,211.24, Ethereum at $4,310.36, XRP at $2.83, and Dogecoin at $0.2159. 88,158 traders were liquidated in the past 24 hours for $346.33 million. Top gainers: MemeCore, Pump. Fun, Aerodrome Finance. Notable developments include SEC and CFTC considering onshoring perpetual futures for US investors, Sora Ventures launching a $1 billion Bitcoin Treasury Fund, and Ray Dalio endorsing crypto as an attractive alternative.
data.description: The cryptocurrency markets are experiencing a period of stability following a turbulent session in New York. The current prices for popular cryptocurrencies are as follows: Bitcoin (BTC) is at $111,211.24, Ethereum (ETH) at $4,310.36, Solana (SOL) at $204.26, XRP at $2.83, Dogecoin (DOGE) at $0.2159, and Shiba Inu (SHIB) at $0.00001238. Coinglass data reveals that within the last 24 hours, a total of 88,158 traders were liquidated, resulting in a total loss of $346.33 million. Some of the top gainers during this period are MemeCore (M), Pump. Fun (PUMP), and Aerodrome Finance (AERO). In recent developments, regulatory bodies SEC and CFTC are showing interest in allowing onshoring perpetual futures for US investors, Sora Ventures has launched a $1 billion Bitcoin Treasury Fund to promote corporate adoption in Asia, and prominent investor Ray Dalio believes that cryptocurrencies may become an appealing alternative due to concerns about fiat money's ability to store wealth effectively. Additionally, North Korean hackers allegedly linked to Kim Jong Un have been involved in suspicious job-related activities. For further details, refer to the full article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Hyperliquid invites proposals to launch USDH stablecoin, facing criticism for alleged unfairness by an existing stablecoin protocol.
data.description: A well-known stablecoin protocol based on Hyperliquid technology has expressed disagreement with the recent USDH proposal announcement, describing it as unjust.
